title: Inside the Mengo Social Centre Medical Camp
excerpt: How four organisations came together for a single day that reached over 900 people.
author: Naira Kateregga
body:
On August 10, 2025, NK Udada Foundation coordinated one of the largest single-day outreach efforts in our history at the Mengo Social Centre.

Working alongside the Hajat Minsa Kabanda Foundation, BAPS Charities, Mengo Doctors Clinic, and the Sembera Foundation, our team helped deliver HIV testing and counselling, family planning services, youth counselling, and free medication to more than 900 community members.

**Why it mattered**

For many attendees, this was the first time they had accessed a health screening in years. Our volunteers ran a youth counselling tent alongside the medical stations, giving young people a private space to ask questions about reproductive health without judgement.

Days like this are only possible because of partnerships. We're grateful to every organisation and volunteer who showed up — and to everyone who has supported NK Udada along the way.
